content: Verify current directory structure and check for existing files
Create Xcode project structure for ClawController
Set up TCA dependencies via SPM
Create core domain models (ChatMessage, TaskNode, ToolCall, AgentSession)
Implement networking layer (WebSocketManager, NDJSONParser, ConnectionStateMachine)
Create TCA reducers for all features (Chat, Tasks, Tools, Logs, Analytics, Settings)
Build Design System foundation (colors, typography, components)
Implement Chat UI with message bubbles and markdown rendering
Build Task Dashboard with tree view and statistics
Create Tools Inspector with timeline view
Implement Terminal/Logs view with ANSI color support
Build Settings screen with all configuration options
Configure signing for physical iPhone (development team, bundle ID)
Build project for physical iPhone and install
Verify app runs successfully on physical iPhone
Phase 2: Design System & Core Components
Create Task Dashboard with tree view and statistics
Create Tools Inspector with timeline view
Implement Terminal/Logs view with ANSI color support
Build Settings screen with all configuration options
Configure signing for physical iPhone
Build project for physical iPhone and install
Verify app runs successfully on physical iPhone
Phase 3: Networking Layer
Phase 4: Chat Feature (Core)
Phase 5: Task Dashboard Feature
Check current project structure and verify completed work
Implement TasksReducer with task parsing logic
Build TaskDashboardView with header stats
Implement TaskTreeView with expand/collapse
Create TaskNodeRow with status icons
Build TaskStatsHeader with circular progress
Implement TaskDetailSheet for task details
Test Task Dashboard on iOS Simulator
Open iOS Simulator and launch ClawController app
Set iPhone 16 Pro Max as default simulator
Navigate to Tasks tab and verify Task Dashboard loads
Investigate missing ClawControllerFeature package product
Fix missing package dependency in Xcode project
Build and run app on simulator
Navigate to Tasks tab and verify Task Dashboard loads
Test TaskTreeView with expand/collapse functionality
Verify TaskNodeRow status icons (pending, in_progress, completed, failed, skipped)
Test TaskStatsHeader with circular progress rings
Verify TaskDetailSheet opens on tap
Take screenshots and document any issues
Phase 6: Tools Inspector Feature
Implement ToolsReducer with timeline management
Build ToolsInspectorView with timeline container
Create ToolTimelineView with chronological list
Implement ToolCallCard with full details
Build ToolFilterBar with filter chips
Create ToolStatsView with charts
Build ToolDetailSheet for tool details
Phase 7: Logs/Terminal Feature
Phase 8: Analytics, Settings, Sessions
Phase 9: System Integrations
Phase 10: Onboarding & Polish
Phase 11: Deployment to Physical iPhone
